basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Mangalagiri Tutor/Demonstrator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Mangalagiri
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Mangalagiri (AIIMS Mangalagiri) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Mangalagiri has released the official notification for 2 Tutor/Demonstrator posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Andhra Pradesh. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details and relaxation criteria for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: For Medical Candidates: A medical qualification included in the I or II schedule or Part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act of 1956 (Persons possessing qualifications included in Part II or third schedule should also fulfill the conditions specified in section 13 (3) of the Act. Individual must have completed 1 year of compulsory internship. Desirable: Candidate with MD/MS from recognized University/Institute in concerned subject will be preferred. For Non-Medical Candidates: Postgraduate qualification e.g. Master's degree in the discipline/allied subject. Desirable: Candidate with Ph.D from recognized University/Institute in concerned subject will be preferred.
qualification.details: For Medical Candidates: A medical qualification included in the I or II schedule or Part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act of 1956 (Persons possessing qualifications included in Part II or third schedule should also fulfill the conditions specified in section 13 (3) of the Act. Individual must have completed 1 year of compulsory internship. Desirable: Candidate with MD/MS from recognized University/Institute in concerned subject will be preferred. For Non-Medical Candidates: Postgraduate qualification e.g. Master's degree in the discipline/allied subject. Desirable: Candidate with Ph.D from recognized University/Institute in concerned subject will be preferred.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Mangalagiri to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Tutor/Demonstrator posts is 10th June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Tutor/Demonstrator post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Tutor/Demonstrator positions at AIIMS Mangalagiri. These are distributed across specific departments.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary for medical and non-medical candidates. Medical candidates need a recognized medical qualification and internship, while non-medical candidates require a postgraduate degree. Specific details are in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, the official notification states that there is no application fee for any category, including General, OBC, SC, and ST candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Tutor/Demonstrator posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: Document Verification and a personal Interview. Candidates must clear both to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The positions of Tutor/Demonstrator at AIIMS Mangalagiri are contractual in nature. This means the employment is for a fixed term as per the institute's requirements.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Applications for the AIIMS Mangalagiri Tutor/Demonstrator recruitment must be submitted online. Ensure you use the provided link to fill out the application form.

faq.question: Q9. What are the interview dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The interview dates for the AIIMS Mangalagiri Tutor/Demonstrator recruitment are scheduled from 22nd June 2026 to 24th June 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Which departments have vacancies for Tutor/Demonstrator?
faq.answer: The vacancies for Tutor/Demonstrator are in the Anatomy department (1 post) and the Physiology department (1 post).
